headline: P&L exposure: ₹45,000 Cr FII outflow (engine estimate) + ₹3,150 Cr earnings impact (engine estimate) + ₹48,150 Cr total exposure (engine estimate)
what_matters: P/E compression of 5-10% is likely (engine estimate), with margin erosion of 2470.2 bps (engine estimate) and total revenue at risk of ₹48,150 Cr (engine estimate) if investor sentiment does not recover.
The FII outflow of ₹45,000 Cr (engine estimate) directly increases the cost of capital by 20-40 bps as per BRSR/TCFD triggers, with potential for further bond spread widening if outflows persist.
Triggered frameworks: BRSR (mandatory), TCFD, COSO ERM; non-disclosure or weak risk management could invite SEBI scrutiny, trading restrictions, or mandatory audits within 2-8 quarters.
action: Quantify exposure: ₹45,000 Cr FII outflow (engine estimate) + ₹3,150 Cr earnings impact (engine estimate) + ₹48,150 Cr total exposure (engine estimate)
